source: AgentFixer: From Failure Detection to Fix Recommendations in LLM Agentic Systems (AGENT 2026 workshop)

tools.name: Input-Schema-Non-compliance-Detector
tools.description: Check whether user input satisfies the schema specified by the system prompt.

tools.name: Input-Instructions-Non-compliance-Detector
tools.description: Check whether user input follows the system-prompt instructions.

tools.name: Input-Format-Violation-Detector
tools.description: Check whether user input obeys format constraints.

tools.name: Prompt-Consistency-Validator: internal contradictions
tools.description: Detect contradictions inside the system prompt.

tools.name: Prompt-Consistency-Validator: example misalignment
tools.description: Detect inconsistency between few-shot examples and task requirements.

tools.name: Edge-Case-Instruction-Validator
tools.description: Detect missing edge-case coverage in the system prompt.

tools.name: Few-Shot-Coverage-Validator
tools.description: Detect coverage gaps in the few-shot examples.

tools.name: Output-Schema-Non-compliance-Detector
tools.description: Check whether the response output matches the required schema.

tools.name: Output-Instructions-Non-compliance-Detector
tools.description: Check whether the response follows output instructions.

tools.name: Output-Format-Violation-Detector
tools.description: Check whether the response follows the required output format.

tools.name: Unusual-Token-Detector
tools.description: Detect unusual characters and encoding issues in the output.

tools.name: Python-Code-Syntax-Validator
tools.description: Check syntax and basic structural integrity of Python code segments.

tools.name: Information-Consistency-Validator
tools.description: Check for truncation, modification, or hallucination of explicit information.

tools.name: Reasoning-Action-Mismatch-Detector
tools.description: Detect discrepancies between reasoning and final action or conclusion.
